2. ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md (user preferences everywhere)
3. .claude/rules/*.md (team's modular rules)
4. CLAUDE.md (team-shared via git)
5. /etc/claude-code/CLAUDE.md (IT-deployed org-wide)
6. ~/.claude/projects/.../memory/ (Claude's auto memory notes)

# In CLAUDE.md, add session handoff protocol:

## Session Handoff Protocol
At end of each session, create SESSION-NOTES.md with:
- What was accomplished
- What was NOT done (and why)
- Current blockers
- Next session starting point
- Any important context future sessions need
Externalizes memory to filesystem where it's free.
